properties.name: input-spec.auto-scan
properties.description: Whether to automatically scan for {@link io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spring.annotations.InputSpecEnabled} entities.

properties.name: input-spec.base-path
properties.description:
Base path prefix for all input-spec endpoints.

Default: empty (inherits from server context path)

properties.name: input-spec.cors-allowed-origins
properties.description: CORS allowed origins (if enableCors is true).

properties.name: input-spec.enable-cors
properties.description: Whether to enable CORS for input-spec endpoints.

properties.name: input-spec.endpoint-suffix
properties.description:
Endpoint suffix for input-spec endpoints.

Default: "/input-spec"

Example: If entity is "User", endpoint will be "/users/input-spec"

properties.name: input-spec.entity-scan-packages
properties.description:
Base packages to scan for entities.

If empty, uses the application's main package.
